creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
nivit       2010-12-18 09:24:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science/vmd          Makefile distinfo 
  Added files:
    science/vmd/files    patch-bin_vmd.csh patch-bin_vmd.sh 
  Log:
  - Add files/patch-bin_vmd.csh, files/patch-bin_vmd.sh
    to fix a runtime error (the "ARCH" value is not set)
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  - Remove MD5 checksum from distinfo
  - Set ONLY_FOR_ARCHS (i386 and amd64)
  
  PR:             ports/152955
  Submitted by:   Benjamin Kaduk <kaduk-fbsd at mit.edu> (maintainer)
